dev.description: Start Vite dev server on port 1420
dev.prompt: Run `pnpm dev` from repo root to start Vite-only frontend dev server on port 1420.

dev:app.description: Start full Tauri desktop with CEF
dev:app.prompt: Run `pnpm dev:app` from repo root. Starts full Tauri desktop with CEF runtime. Requires git submodules and vendored tauri-cli.

dev:core.prompt: Run `OPENHUMAN_APP_ENV=staging ./target/debug/openhuman-core serve` from repo root. Use TOKEN from `~/.openhuman-staging/core.token` to test with curl.

format.description: Format code with Prettier + cargo fmt

format:check.description: Check formatting with Prettier + cargo fmt --check

test.prompt: Run `pnpm test` from repo root. Runs Vitest (1000+ tests).

test:rust.description: Run Rust tests via mock script
test:rust.prompt: Run `pnpm test:rust` from repo root. Executes scripts/test-rust-with-mock.sh (5600+ tests).

test:all.description: Run all tests: coverage + rust + e2e

rust:check.prompt: Run `cargo check --manifest-path Cargo.toml` for core and `cargo check --manifest-path app/src-tauri/Cargo.toml` for Tauri shell.

rust:test.prompt: Run `cargo test -p openhuman` from repo root (5600+ tests).

git:status.description: Show working tree status + diff summary

god.description: Omnipotent agent with unrestricted access to all tools and permissions

delivery-loop.description: Autonomous pipeline that continuously resolves open GitHub issues through Plan-Implement-Validate-Review cycle

general.description: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions and executing multi-step tasks

explore.description: Fast agent specialized for exploring codebases

rust-dev.description: Rust development specialist for openhuman-core domain modules, JSON-RPC handlers, and event bus patterns

frontend-dev.description: Frontend specialist for React + Tauri UI, Redux, i18n, and Vitest

test-agent.description: Testing specialist — manages Vitest, Rust tests, and E2E specs

reviewer.description: PR reviewer — checks tests, typecheck, lint, and formatting

docs-agent.description: Documentation specialist for AGENTS.md, gitbooks, and inline docs
